--- 
title: "Members"
output: 
  html_document:
    css: ['CSSBackgrounds.css', 'CSSFonts.css']
    includes:
      after_body: footer.html
---


<center>![](./GBLab.png){width=250px}

## Prospective members
My lab is open to recruit undergraduate students at Hope College that are interested in gaining experience in aquatic-focused research. Students excited to do lab, field work, and/or a mix of both lab and field work are welcome to contact me!  
If you are interested in joining the lab, please check the website and think about what topic is most aligned to your interests and goals. Please contact me and we can chat about opportunities!

## Current members: eDNA project
CC Shaffer - Environmental Science major with a biology concentration (Fall 2024 - present)
Emily Drape - Biology major and French minor (Summer 2026 - present)
Claire VanTol - Biology major and Environmental Science minor (Summer 2026 - present)
Anna Forey - Biology major (Summer 2026 -  present). Anna co-wrote and was awarded an Environmental Research Pierce Cedar Creek Institute): Congrats Anna!

### Past members: eDNA project
Annalise (Annie) Waldron - Biology major (Spring 2025 - Summer 2025). Annie co-wrote and was awarded a NOAA - Michigan Sea Grant Environmental Internship: Congrats Annie!
Lucas Day - Biology major Fall 2024
Students in Aquatic Ecosystems Fall 2024 (TA: Emma Yonker & Fall 2025)

## Current members: Lake Tanganyika cichlid behavior project
Calla Vandehaar-Johnsen - Biology major (Spring 2026 - present) 


### Past members: Lake Tanganyika cichlid behavior project
Kam Bice - Biology major and Environmental Science minor (Fall 2024 Fall 2025) 
Anissa Wille - Environmental Science major (Fall 2025 - Spring 2025)
Terryn Ferguson - Neuroscience major (Spring 2026)
Maximus Rose - Biology major (Summer 2025)


### Past members: Invasive carp genomics project
Charlene Yen Xin Chia - Biology major (Summer 2025)
